arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the App Mesh gateway route.

created_date.description: The date and time when the App Mesh gateway route was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the App Mesh gateway route.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the App Mesh gateway route was last updated.

mesh_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the service mesh owner.

resource_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the resource owner.

spec.description: The specifications for the App Mesh gateway route, including routing rules and actions.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the App Mesh gateway route.
